caption: A group of men, wearing face masks and athletic attire, walk through a glass-walled pedestrian tunnel. The men are dressed in grey polo shirts, dark pants, and white sneakers, with some carrying backpacks. A Real Madrid club logo is visible at the top center of several frames. The scene shows the men walking forward toward the camera. In the foreground, one man leads the group, while several others follow behind him. As they progress, the lead man moves closer to the lens, and the gap between him and the men following increases slightly. The surroundings consist of glass panels and a metallic framework, with shadows stretching across the grey floor of the walkway. There is no legible on-screen text other than the team crest.
